confirmation_scope: No billable RunPod acquisition or training launch is authorized by this preflight spec. Before launch, present this table and get explicit user confirmation in the current conversation.

code.commit_policy: Use the committed branch head produced by the corrected standard-graph preflight pass.

requires_preflight: Verify Docker image tag exists before pod create.
Check secure RTX 5090 availability by datacenter.
After pod create, poll the .ssh object and prove SSH with nvidia-smi before setup.
